items.item: DDU Digital Design Unit, TU Darmstadt
Analyzes the current Grasshopper document to identify script components, extracts their source code, and can export them as Grasshopper User Objects (.ghuser) and raw source files (.py, .c
Converts to collection of boolean values
Converts to collection of boolean values
Converts to collection of text fragments
Converts to collection of text fragments
Converts to collection of text fragments
Converts to collection of text fragments
Converts to collection of text fragments
Standard output and error contents collected during script run
